title: musa × calicutensis
intro: Musa × calicutensis, also known as the Calicut banana or Fe'i banana, is a hybrid species of banana belonging to the genus Musa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Musa × calicutensis include relief from gastrointestinal disorders, reduced risk of infections, and improved immune function. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
